name: Baked Stuffed Carrots
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Red or Green Bell Pepper, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the carrots for 30 minutes or until tender.
2. Cut the carrots in half.
3. Scoop out the centers of the carrots and mash them.
4. Chop the onion and bell pepper. Add salt, pepper, and 1 tablespoon butter to the mashed carrot centers. Mix well.
5. Stuff the remaining eight halves of carrots with the mixture.
6. Place in a dish greased with 1 tablespoon butter.
7. Bake for about 30 minutes at 350°F.
Serves: 8
Source: "Mountain Measures" --Junior Leauge of Charleston, WV, ed. 1974
